asset.title: Workbook Style Toggle
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates the workbook style toggle feature, showing seamless transitions between Excel File, Sheets Collab, and Evidence Review modes with live trace updates.

featureClarity.evidence: The toggle buttons for Excel File, Sheets Collab, and Evidence Review are prominently displayed and clicked, showing immediate UI changes.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the entire flow from uploading an Excel file to switching views and observing the corresponding state changes in the room trace.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode interface with well-aligned panels, though some text in the chat and trace is slightly dense.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with NodeRoom's core concepts of files, spreadsheets, and structured room traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity screen recording showing real-time UI interactions, cursor movements, and state updates.

legibility.evidence: Most text and cell values are highly legible, though some smaller labels in the sidebar require zooming.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial and compliance workflows where auditing spreadsheet formulas and data ownership is critical.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the UI state and local style changes without implying automated backend magic.

observedEvidence: Excel File view with formula bar and merged cells
Sheets Collab view with versioned write path
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Toggle between Excel File, Sheets Collab, and Evidence Review modes to audit formulas, collaborate in real-time, or verify data provenance.
